description_long: This object consists of a matching set of two modern, blocky couches: a single-seater armchair and a two-seater sofa. Both pieces feature thick, rectangular seat and back cushions in a muted taupe or gray color, framed by robust, squared armrests and bases in a contrasting light gray with black accent lines. The armrests and bases are visually segmented, giving the set a modular, almost industrial appearance. The seat and back cushions are flat and appear firmly attached, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. The legs are short, block-like, and integrated into the base, providing a sturdy, grounded look. The overall design is minimalist and geometric, suitable for urban public spaces such as parks, plazas, or waiting areas.
description: A modern, blocky couch set with taupe cushions and segmented light gray and black frames, including a single-seater and a two-seater. The design is minimalist, geometric, and robust, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the single-seater and two-seater couches, highlighting the flat seat and back cushions, squared armrests, and modular frame design.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the cushions and the depth of the armrests and base, with the geometric segmentation clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panels of both couches, which are flat and unadorned, and the blocky base structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing the depth and blocky construction of the armrests and base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One single seat and back cushion on the armchair, two seat and two back cushions on the two-seater; all cushions are flat, rectangular, and appear attached with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are short, block-shaped, and integrated into the base, appearing to be made of the same material as the frame with black accent lines.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are straight, squared, and robust, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a segmented, modular look with light gray and black coloration.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrests are high, flat, and rectangular, divided into individual sections for each seat, and appear firmly attached with no tufting or decorative features.
